title: Mario Kart Wii WCL: Noob
description:
The best quality, unedited video: http://www.megaupload.com/?d=16X3WG40

This video shows some footages of the player Noob, from Metal Soldiers 2 (Ms2) on really interesting situations, gaining distance really easy or poping items from nowhere. Watch and post your conclusions...


Explanations by Luke*TRAK:

""1) GBA BC3: Lightning is used. It strikes Nefos and Noob. Which means, they have no items anymore. Nefos gets a green shell in the item box. Noob is in second place, which means it's impossible that he gets a triple-mushroom. Could Noob get fast like that with a single mushroom?

2) Sherbet Land: This one is quite acceptable. Noob was around 4th place when he starts to accelerate with a possible golden mushroom. However, put a sticker on the screen, exactly at the item boxes' part, just to indicate that part for further observation. That's what I did and, then, I noticed that Noob starts to accelerate before the boxes' part. Would he really be saving a golden mushroom to use exactly before the boxes? It makes no sense to me. Anyway, this is just a strange thing. Not a proof.

3) Jungle Parkway (part 1): How is it possible that Noob gets hit by a Blue Shell (his Funky's face spinning in the map proves that he did not escape) and after such a short time he is already beside Nefos, and still have a green shell (which means that he definitely got no mushrooms in the boxes)?

4) Jungle Parkway (part 2): Look at Noob right in front of Nefos. Listen to his Funky's scream. He used a mushroom. Freeze the video around 3 seconds later and notice that, after using a shroom, he has a banana behind him, without any other item boxes. Further, I wonder how could he open that distance being in first place. I think not even the most perfect lines would do that. Isn't Noob too fast?

5) Mario Raceway: No need for many explanations in this one. Unless Nefos' game is terribly lagged (suddenly like that?), speed hack detected.""
